labels.name: post_biorhythm_critical_days
labels.description: Find all critical days (zero crossings) within a date range up to 180 days. Returns each critical day with cycle name, period, direction (ascending or descending), severity (single, double, or triple), and advisory text. labels.name: post_biorhythm_compatibility
labels.description: Calculate biorhythm compatibility between two people by overlaying their cycle profiles on a target date. labels.name: post_biorhythm_phases
labels.description: Get current phase information for all 10 biorhythm cycles without the full interpretation payload. Returns value, phase name, phase label, day position within cycle, cycle period, days until next critical crossing, and short-term trend for each cycle. Includes a compact summary string. labels.name: post_biorhythm_daily
labels.description: Get a daily biorhythm reading with seeded randomness for consistent "biorhythm of the day" features. Same seed and same date always produce the same reading, perfect for daily push notifications, morning briefings, and wellness app check-ins. Returns energy rating, overall phase, a spotlight on one

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "biorhythm" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: post_biorhythm_phases, post_biorhythm_daily · Public sink: post_biorhythm_reading, post_biorhythm_forecast, post_biorhythm_critical_days, post_biorhythm_compatibility, post_biorhythm_phases, post_biorhythm_daily.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: post_biorhythm_phases, post_biorhythm_daily · Public sink: post_biorhythm_reading, post_biorhythm_forecast, post_biorhythm_critical_days, post_biorhythm_compatibility, post_biorhythm_phases, post_biorhythm_daily

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
